sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ الأَخُ الْكَبِيرُ تَعْلِيمَ أُخْتِهِ الصَّغِيرَةِ الْحِسَابَ.
sentences.translation: Stariji brat je odlučio naučiti mlađu sestru računanju.
sentences.translationEn: The older brother decided to teach his little sister arithmetic.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَا مَعًا عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ وَبَدَآ الدَّرْسَ.
sentences.translation: Sjeli su zajedno za sto i počeli lekciju.
sentences.translationEn: They sat together at the table and began the lesson.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الأُخْتُ تَسْأَلُ كَثِيرًا وَالأَخُ يَشْرَحُ بِصَبْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Sestra je puno pitala a brat je strpljivo objašnjavao.
sentences.translationEn: The sister asked a lot and the brother explained patiently.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ فَهِمَتِ الأُخْتُ وَشَكَرَتْ أَخَاهَا.
sentences.translation: Na kraju je sestra razumjela i zahvalila bratu.
sentences.translationEn: In the end the sister understood and thanked her brother.
